product_identity.name: Source-Blendr
product_identity.product_type: B2B supplier aggregation, pricing, quoting, and resale management platform
product_identity.product_category: Sourcing operations, supplier aggregation, service aggregation, pricing automation, catalog and quote generation
product_identity.core_problem: Businesses that buy, customize, package, and resell vendor offerings must manage products, services, production costs, pricing, quotes, catalogs, and margins across disconnected supplier portals, spreadsheets, documents, and manual workflows.
product_identity.core_promise: Centralize supplier products, services, production costs, pricing rules, bundles, catalogs, price books, quotes, and margin controls in one intelligent resale operating workspace.
product_identity.primary_user_outcome: A business user can aggregate supplier products and services, assemble custom offerings, price them profitably, and produce customer-ready catalogs, price books, quotes, or proposals from one source of truth.

strategic_intent.why_now: Resellers, decorators, print brokers, sign shops, contractors, and promotional product businesses increasingly need to combine products, services, labor, shipping, and vendor-specific costs into fast, accurate customer-facing sales outputs.
strategic_intent.behavior_change_required: Users must trust Source-Blendr as the operational system of record for supplier assets, service costs, bundle definitions, pricing rules, margin visibility, and generated sales documents.
strategic_intent.value_proposition: Reduce manual supplier research, duplicated catalog work, pricing errors, quote delays, margin leakage, and fragmented resale operations.
strategic_intent.platform_positioning: Source-Blendr is the operating system for sourcing, pricing, packaging, quoting, and reselling vendor products and services.
initial_exclusions: Full procurement and purchase order automation
Real-time guaranteed inventory across every vendor

recommendations.recommendation: Validate the first target vertical before finalizing MVP scope.
recommendations.rationale: Apparel decorators, promotional product resellers, sign shops, awards businesses, contractors, and print brokers have different service models and pricing needs.

recommendations.recommendation: Make products, services, bundles, recipes, and customer-facing outputs first-class planning objects.
recommendations.rationale: The expanded vision depends on combining product costs, service costs, labor, shipping, packaging, setup fees, and margin logic.

recommendations.recommendation: Keep the MVP focused on one or two import methods, a unified asset library, pricing and margin calculation, bundle/recipe creation, and one quote or catalog output path.
recommendations.rationale: The full platform spans integrations, AI, automation, analytics, customer portals, collaboration, and enterprise governance; shipping all of that at once would obscure validation.

assumptions.assumption: The primary initial buyers are businesses that source vendor products and services, combine them into resale offerings, and need accurate pricing, margin, catalog, and quote workflows.
The MVP should support reliable file/manual imports before broad automatic supplier portal synchronization.
Bundles and production recipes are essential differentiators, but the MVP can start with simple reusable bundle/recipe templates before advanced workflow automation.

source_trace.evidence: Repository README describes Source-Blendr as a wholesale sourcing and product management platform.

Expanded brief defines supplier aggregation, service aggregation, pricing, bundling, recipes, catalogs, price books, quoting, customer management, automation, AI, integrations, analytics, collaboration, and enterprise expansion.
